scores.correctness_notes: YAML is fully correct: all three sections (services, checks, log-targets) present with accurate field names and values. backoff-delay/factor/limit are real Pebble service params. Minor explanation imprecision about 'level: alive' causing restarts (that's on-check-failure's job, level maps to K8s probes) but the YAML itself is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit are all real Pebble service parameters; all other fields match the spec
